---
title: "Matching and Weighting for Causal Inference: Full Code"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
  eval: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

This document contains the complete R code extracted from `matching-methods-report.qmd`.

```{r}
#| results: asis
cat("```r\n")
cat(readLines("matching-methods-report-full-code.R"), sep = "\n")
cat("\n```")
```
